data.title: Licensed candies inspired by Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 released globally by Amos Sweets. MILAN, Feb. 14, 2026.
data.description: Amos Sweets has introduced a new candy collection inspired by the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, featuring fun designs, unique textures, and interactive experiences. The collection, released in Milan on February 14, 2026, showcases the essence of the upcoming games through a variety of sweet treats.

data.title: Smith Brands launches talkBAK®, a voice recorder toy allowing 60-sec recording, instant playback, and pitch adjustment at Toy Fair.
data.description: Today in New York City, Smith Brands introduced talkBAK®, an innovative handheld voice recorder toy that allows kids to record up to 60 seconds of audio which can be played back instantly. Users also have the option to adjust the pitch higher or lower. Available in four distinct color variations, this new toy is a screen-free entertainment option.

data.title: DeWolfe Living spotlight Boston real estate & lifestyle on REAL Shows Network. Hosted by Tammy DeWolfe. Boston defines.
data.description: A new series hosted by Tammy DeWolfe is shining a spotlight on the individuals, communities, and enterprises that shape the essence of Boston. The initiative, based in Boston, is part of the REAL Shows Network (RSN), a TV network focused on showcasing real estate and lifestyle narratives. Launched on February 14, 2026, the series aims to celebrate the local charm and character of Boston, reaching a wide audience through RSN's national platform. Tammy DeWolfe's leadership in this endeavor promises to offer viewers an insightful glimpse into the diverse tapestry of Boston, with a focus on the stories of its residents, neighborhoods, and businesses.

data.title: Boeing in buy zone, leads 5 stocks to watch during short trading week with strong technical action.
data.description: A recently published report highlights the performance of five stocks from different sectors, showcasing strong technical indicators. Among the mentioned stocks are Boeing, Viking Holdings, and TJX, as well as an artificial intelligence-driven company in the construction sector. Boeing is noted to be leading the pack, holding steady in the buy zone. The article specifically mentions these stocks as ones to keep an eye on for investors, especially given the shortened trading week.

data.title: Shareholders in China Liberal Education Holdings Ltd. (OTCMKTS: CLEUF) who suffered losses urged to contact Wolf Haldenstein by March 31, 2026.
data.description: The lead plaintiff deadline for the class action lawsuit against China Liberal Education Holdings Ltd. (OTCMKTS: CLEUF) is on March 31, 2026. A law firm, Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP, has disclosed this information in New York on February 14, 2026. The lawsuit pertains to certain matters concerning the Company.

data.title: New "Kaiju Power Rangers" action figure line debuts at Toy Fair, arriving at Target next month; merges Mighty Morphin Power Rangers and Godzilla franchises.
data.description: Unveiling at Toy Fair this weekend, the initial rollout will hit Target stores starting from next month in 2026. Playmates Toys is set to bring beloved characters to life for both children and collectors throughout the year. This latest partnership combines two iconic franchises, captivating fans of all ages.

data.title: Tamagotchi celebrates 30 years with new products, partnerships, and national events at New York Toy Fair.
data.description: At the New York Toy Fair, a significant year is marked with the introduction of novel products, retail engagements, and interactive fan events. Tamagotchi, the renowned digital pet, commemorates its 30th anniversary, symbolizing thirty years of cultural impact.

data.title: Stock futures rise post strong jobs report; US adds 130,000 jobs in Jan (vs 70,000 exp), erased 898,000 jobs from Apr 2024-Mar 2025. Dow Jones +0.19%, S&P 500 +0.25%, Nasdaq 100 +0.22%, Russell 2000 +0.59%. Micron (MU) jumps 3.33% post-Morgan Stanley's price target raise to $450.
data.description: U.S. stock futures saw an uptick after a dip the previous day, buoyed by a robust January jobs report indicating the addition of 130,000 jobs, exceeding the expected 70,000. This marked a significant improvement over December’s addition of 48,000 jobs. However, the report also revealed a revision eliminating around 898,000 jobs from payroll estimates. The 10-year Treasury bond yield was at 4.175%, with a 3.502% yield on the two-year bond. The market indicated a 94.1% probability of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates in March. Key index performances showed slight gains: Dow Jones (+0.19%), S&P 500 (+0.25%), Nasdaq 100 (+0.22%), and Russell 2000 (+0.59%). Pre-market trading showed the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust at $693.57, up 0.23%, and the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF at $614.41, down 0.21%. Micron Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MU) surged, gaining 3.33% in pre-market trading after a 10% rise previously, triggered by a price target increase to $450 by Morgan Stanley. This rise reflects MU’s strong price trend in the short, medium, and long term.

data.title: SEC's focus on crypto has shifted dramatically under Trump. New valentine for crypto.
data.description: The SEC's newfound emphasis on cryptocurrency symbolizes a significant change under President Donald Trump's administration.

data.title: Stock market rally paused as Dow Jones futures rose. Cisco and McDonald's led overnight earnings movers.
data.description: The recent upsurge in the stock market took a break for the second consecutive session. Prominent companies on the Dow Jones, such as Cisco and McDonald's, reported strong earnings, driving the market movement. Dow Jones futures are currently on the rise, with Cisco, McDonald's, and AppLovin standing out as leaders in earnings performance.

data.title: HTX and AINFT partner for Web3 AI gateway, prizes up to 40,000 USDT. AI and crypto integration advancing.
data.description: On February 14, 2026, in Panama City, the integration of artificial intelligence and crypto ecosystems is reaching a new level as global AI capabilities develop further and Web3 infrastructure becomes more established. HTX and AINFT have partnered to host a joint event to explore this integration. This collaboration signifies a pivotal moment as companies aim to leverage AI and crypto technologies to enhance their operations.

data.title: HTX Ventures and HTX DAO joined Consensus Hong Kong 2026 to advance Web3 ecosystem, gathering blockchain leaders and investors.
data.description: Panama City hosted Consensus Hong Kong 2026 from February 11 to 12, a successful event that attracted prominent figures from the global blockchain sector. HTX Ventures and HTX DAO, key players in the industry, actively participated in the main conference. The event saw the convergence of top blockchain leaders, developers, and institutional investors on a global scale.

data.title: Data breach at Figure Technology exposes personal customer details after hackers leaked user data due to a social-engineering attack and company declined to pay ransom.
data.description: ShinyHunters, a group of cybercriminals, managed to access user data following a social-engineering attack on an employee of Figure. The company declined to pay a ransom to the hackers.

data.title: Machine learning, deep learning AI models improve food allergy diagnostics by 40% compared to standard tests.
data.description: In a recent study conducted in Milwaukee on February 14, 2026, machine learning models demonstrated an impressive 40% enhancement in diagnostic accuracy when compared to traditional methods such as oral food challenges, skin prick tests, and allergen-specific IgE measurements. These findings highlight the potential of both machine learning and deep learning AI models in improving diagnostic capabilities in the medical field.

data.title: HTX offering 3,000,000 USDT Airdrop in celebration of Lunar New Year. Claim rewards now!
data.description: In anticipation of the upcoming Lunar New Year, HTX has revealed the exciting introduction of their premier celebration, the Mega Spring Festival Airdrops. In honor of the Year of the Horse, HTX is set to distribute an impressive 3,000,000 USDT in a bid to spread prosperity and luck.

data.title: Software companies rebranding as A.I. innovators as stocks drop. Some successful, others not. Sparkle emojis abundant.
data.description: With declining stock prices, software companies are shifting their focus to become leaders in artificial intelligence technology. The trend of using sparkling emojis is ubiquitous, although the results have varied in success.

data.title: Is A.I. reliable for translating love messages? Tech reporter explores with couple using A.I. - industry worth $20B.
data.description: The field of A.I. translation has witnessed significant growth, emerging as a massive industry. However, questions linger regarding its accuracy. In a recent deep dive by tech reporter Kashmir Hill, the successes and shortcomings of A.I. translation are scrutinized through the lens of a couple who heavily depend on it for communication. This investigation sheds light on the efficacy of A.I. translation technology in real-world scenarios.

data.title: AAVE price aims $135-140 by March 2026. Currently trades at $127.75 with RSI 47.69. Recovery possible in 4-6 weeks if surpassing $133.71.
data.description: The digital asset AAVE is currently trading at $127.75 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 47.69. Technical analysis indicates a potential recovery towards the $135-140 resistance range in the next 4-6 weeks, dependent on surpassing the $133.71 mark.

data.title: LDO price predicted to reach $0.42 by March based on technical indicators. Short-term target $0.38, critical support $0.33.
data.description: Summary of LDO Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price is $0.38. For the medium term (1 month), the forecast ranges between $0.40 and $0.42. The bullish breakout level is set at $0.42, while the critical support level stands at $0.33.

data.title: WIF Price Forecast: Aims for $0.25 by Mar. 2026; currently at $0.23 with bearish signal. Resistance at $0.27, support at $0.20.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DogWifHat (WIF) is currently trading at $0.23, showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and a bearish momentum. Technical analysis points towards a possible uptrend to the range of $0.25-$0.27 if a crucial resistance level is breached. However, there is a risk of the price falling to $0.20 on the downside.
